top_signals.title: Britain’s Borrowing Outlook Darkens as Energy Shock Deepens
top_signals.summary: Chancellor Rachel Reeves has been warned that government borrowing is set to spike as a result of the Iran war, as the Office for Budget Responsibility admitted it had underestimated the effects of the last energy price shock.  In a review of its forecasting models, the OBR suggested it had learned lessons from Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine, which led to gas prices rising by around five times.  It said the overall impact on public finances “was to significantly increase government borrowing and debt” despite…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil prices rise after Netanyahu tells CNBC Israel and U.S. prepared to attack Iran again if necessary - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Oil prices rise after Netanyahu tells CNBC Israel and U.S. prepared to attack Iran again if necessary  CNBC

top_signals.title: US tells Europe, Canada to boost NATO air and naval forces
top_signals.summary: “Nations just need to assign the capabilities they have to NATO,” a spokesman for the alliance's military headquarters said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Broadcom stock plunges on weak software sales, unchanged AI chip forecast for the year
top_signals.summary: Broadcom reported fiscal second-quarter results on Wednesday and missed estimates for revenue.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Energy Companies 'Weren't Prepared' For AI Data Center Boom Says NRG's Caroline Golin
top_signals.summary: Caroline Golin, chief growth and policy officer at NRG Energy, said that AI expansion has outpaced the infrastructure necessary to power it and that energy companies 'weren't prepared' for the opportunity in front of them as the US data center buildout ramps up even further. Despite the pressure on the grid, Golin says that the industry is working to make sure the infrastructure is in place to grow into the future.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Solayer rolls out Solana-native onchain perps trading platform Margin Trade mainnet
top_signals.summary: Margin Trade enables trading of crypto, commodities, and equities via a single margin account on Solana, tapping the SVM chain Solayer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Alkermes to Participate in the Goldman Sachs 47th Annual Global Healthcare Conference
top_signals.summary: Alkermes plc (Nasdaq: ALKS) announced today that management will participate in a fireside chat at the Goldman Sachs 47th Annual Global Healthcare Conference on Wednesday, June 10, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. ET (3:00 p.m. BST). The live webcast may be accessed under the Investors tab on www.alkermes.com and will be archived for 14 days. About [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Cornish Tin & Lithium find field extension, make new discovery at Tregonning
top_signals.summary: Drilling confirmed that a newly identified lithium-bearing rock formation continues far beyond the area where it was first discovered.

top_signals.title: Hycroft mine in Nevada assessed $10B value, 51-year life
top_signals.summary: The project has an internal rate of return of 30.1% and a payback period of just under three years.
